mapper.sql: select attr_id, category_id, attr_code, attr_name, attr_type, data_type, is_required, is_unique, is_list_display, is_query_condition, default_value, option_source_type, option_source, validation_rule, sort_order, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from asset_category_attr
mapper.select: where category_id = #{categoryId} order by sort_order asc, attr_id asc
mapper.delete:
delete from asset_category_attr where attr_id in
#{attrId}
